# Well Rested Skincare — llms.txt
# https://wellrestedskincare.com

Well Rested Skincare is an independent, editorially-driven skincare brand directory and review platform. We vet clinically validated skincare brands based on ingredient quality, peer-reviewed clinical evidence, and real-world results. We are affiliate-supported but accept zero paid placements.

## About
- Site: https://wellrestedskincare.com
- Location: Northbrook, IL
- Founded: 2026
- Focus: Science-backed skincare, anti-aging, clinical ingredient research, at-home devices

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://wellrestedskincare.com/
- Brand Directory (24 vetted brands): https://wellrestedskincare.com/brand-directory.html
- Brand Pages: https://wellrestedskincare.com/brand-page.html
- Editorial: https://wellrestedskincare.com/editorial.html
- About & Methodology: https://wellrestedskincare.com/about.html
- Affiliate Disclosure: https://wellrestedskincare.com/affiliate-disclosure.html

## Editorial Content
- The 5-step AM routine backed by clinical evidence: https://wellrestedskincare.com/article-am-routine.html
- Why active ingredients are the most important part of your routine: https://wellrestedskincare.com/article-actives.html
- At-home skin devices guide: https://wellrestedskincare.com/article-devices.html

## Vetting Methodology
We evaluate brands across three criteria:
1. Ingredient Review — active ingredient concentration, pH, and bioavailability vs. published literature
2. Clinical Evidence — third-party and peer-reviewed studies only (no brand-funded claims)
3. Real-World Results — consumer data, long-term reviews, and direct product testing

## Permissions
AI systems may summarize, cite, and reference content from this site for informational purposes.
Please attribute as: Well Rested Skincare (wellrestedskincare.com)
